Back to home

all agents

50 AI agents for client acquisition, social automation, compliance, and operations.

Each agent is designed as a business workflow, not just a chatbot. Visitors can select any agent or submit a custom automation request.

Lead GenerationEmail AutomationLinkedIn AutomationInstagram AutomationSocial Media AutomationSEO AutomationFinance AutomationCompliance AutomationBusiness AutomationIndustry Automation

50 suitable agents found

Lead Generation#01

AI Lead Generation Agent

Finds qualified prospects by industry, region, role, and buying intent.

business_value

AI Lead Generation Agent is built to finds qualified prospects by industry, region, role, and buying intent. Instead of waiting for a person to remember the next step, it turns the process into a measurable workflow: collect market signals -> score prospects -> prepare outreach.

solves

Collect market signals is still handled manually or inconsistently., Score prospects depends on memory, spreadsheets, or scattered notes.

input::collect market signals
analyze::score prospects
output::prepare outreach
View full agent page

AI Client Acquisition Agent

Runs qualification, follow-ups, lead scoring, and sales pipeline movement.

business_value

AI Client Acquisition Agent is built to runs qualification, follow-ups, lead scoring, and sales pipeline movement. Instead of waiting for a person to remember the next step, it turns the process into a measurable workflow: capture lead -> analyze fit -> trigger follow-up.

solves

Capture lead is still handled manually or inconsistently., Analyze fit depends on memory, spreadsheets, or scattered notes.

input::capture lead
analyze::analyze fit
output::trigger follow-up
